$comment: Canonical Nostr wire contract between ndisc (publisher) and the glmps web viewers (consumers) for the record-label image library. UNFROZEN — promoted to frozen + SHA-pinned (mirroring release.v1.json) once ndisc implements publishing.

d.note: Fixed identifier — exactly one label-library event per author. The disco-vault: prefix matches release.v1's convention.

alt.note: NIP-31 human-readable description. Recommended: 'ndisc record-label image library'.

labels.keys: Label name string. Matched verbatim (case-sensitive, whitespace-significant) against the `label` tag value on release events (kind:31237).

label_library.rule: Consumers MUST tolerate missing entries — fall back to a generic glyph. Consumers MUST tolerate extra fields inside each value object — forward-compatible (e.g. `country`, `founded`, `website` may be added in labels.v2).
